header.title: Job Search Tracker
header.subtitle: Sign in to sync across devices · use JSON for offline backup
header.connectDriveTooltip: Connect Google Drive for cross-device sync
header.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad: tap Share (□↑) in Safari, then "Add to Home Screen".
header.androidInstallHint: Install works in Chrome on the live site (HTTPS). Open the ⋮ menu → "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
header.chromeInstallHint: In Chrome: tap ⋮ (top-right) → "Install app" or "Add to Home screen". Use the published https:// link (not localhost). If you don't see it, refresh once — the site must finish loading.

calendar.selectDay: Click a day to see events

board.emptyDesc: Track your applications, interviews, and progress all in one place.
board.signInButton: Sign in with Google — sync everywhere
board.modeCloudDesc: Sign in with Google to auto-save and access your data from any device.
board.modeLocalDesc: Work locally and download a JSON backup whenever you want.

timeline.title: Activity History
timeline.empty: No events to display on the timeline.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Company description and what they do...

detail.noInterviews: No interview information for this company. Click "Edit Details" to add.
detail.selectCompany: Select a company from the list
detail.selectCompanyHint: or use the JSON upload buttons above to load data

stats.title: Statistics
stats.journeySubtitle: How many applications reached each stage — shows where most drop off
stats.noData: Add more companies to see patterns

toast.exported: Backup file downloaded - save it somewhere safe!
toast.driveConnectedWithData: Drive connected — data loaded from Drive!
toast.driveConnectedEmpty: Drive connected — data will sync automatically.

alert.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this company?
alert.noCompanyData: No company data found in the uploaded file.
alert.importError: Error importing file. Make sure this is a valid JSON file you saved previously.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal job search command center
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Track every company, interview, and rejection — all in one place. Your data stays private in your browser.
onboarding.boardSubtitle: Visualize your pipeline with drag & drop
onboarding.boardDesc: Each company appears as a card in its status column. Drag cards between columns to update their status instantly.
onboarding.dragHint: ↑ Interview journey chips show your progress
onboarding.boardTip: Tip: Download a JSON backup daily from the top bar to never lose your data.
onboarding.listDesc: The List tab is your editing hub. Click any company to view details, or add interviews and rejection notes.
onboarding.importDesc: Load a JSON backup you saved previously
onboarding.aiSubtitle: Get personalized prep tips powered by Claude
onboarding.aiDesc: The AI Assistant reads your company data and gives you personalized interview prep tips and rejection analysis — powered by Claude.
onboarding.aiFeature1: Interview prep: 3 targeted tips before each interview
onboarding.aiFeature2: Rejection analysis: learn what to improve
onboarding.aiFeature3: Pattern analysis: spot trends in your job hunt
onboarding.aiKeyDesc: You need a free Anthropic API key. Click the ⚙️ icon in the header to add it.
onboarding.shortcutsDesc: Use keyboard shortcuts to navigate faster:
onboarding.finalTip: You're all set! Add rejection notes to every rejection — the AI can spot patterns to help you improve.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.noKey: Set API key to enable AI →
ai.debriefPlaceholder: Write anything — what questions were asked, how you answered, how you felt, what surprised you...
ai.debriefPrivacy: Avoid writing personal names — this text is sent to the AI.

resume.title: Resume Tailoring
resume.privacy: Do not include your name, email, or phone — this text is sent to the AI.
resume.pasteLabel: Paste your work experience / resume content
resume.placeholder: Paste your work experience, skills, and achievements here...

settings.title: Settings
settings.securityNotice: API keys are stored in this browser only. Anyone with access to this device, or a malicious extension, could read them. Job and chat data you send is transmitted to your chosen AI provider under your account.
settings.ollamaNote: Make sure Ollama is running locally with CORS enabled.
settings.modesNote: Only selected modes appear in the mode switcher.
settings.modesAtLeastOne: At least one mode must remain enabled.

rejection.aiNeeded: Enable AI to get personalized improvement suggestions.

tooltips.interviewType: Select the type of interview. HR = screening, Technical = coding/skills, Manager = culture fit
tooltips.rejectionMethod: How you were notified. Tracking this helps identify ghosting patterns.
tooltips.responseRate: Companies that replied (any stage) ÷ total applications × 100
tooltips.priority: High = active process or dream company. Use to filter and focus your energy.

templates.title: Interview Template Library
templates.footer: Use these to practice. Behavioral answers should follow the STAR format.
templates.footerTasks: Use these prompts when planning, breaking down, or reviewing tasks.

modeSelection.title: Task Manager
modeSelection.desc: Manage tasks with multiple steps and track progress

welcome.title: Welcome to Task Manager
welcome.subtitle: Plan work in steps and track progress
welcome.desc: Create tasks with checklists, use AI coaching templates, and keep everything saved in your browser.

board.emptyDesc: Organize your tasks with multiple steps and track progress at a glance.
board.signInButton: Sign in with Google — sync everywhere

list.selectTask: Select a task from the list

detail.noSteps: No steps. Click "Edit Details" to add steps.

alert.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
alert.noData: No task data found in the uploaded file.

modeSelection.title: How will you use JobFlowTracker?
modeSelection.subtitle: Select the modes you want — you can add or remove them later in Settings
modeSelection.recruiterDesc: Track candidates through your hiring pipeline
modeSelection.fixedNote: You can manage enabled modes anytime in Settings
